DB_HOST.description: PostgreSQL database host. Use the companion PostgreSQL service name on Railway.

DB_PASS.description: Database password. Auto-generated on first deploy — you can change it later.

URL_BASE.description: Public URL of your wiki (required for proper asset serving). Set to http://your-domain.railway.app after deploy.

DB_TYPE.description: Database engine: postgres, mysql, mssql, or sqlite (default: postgres)

DB_FILEPATH.description: Path for SQLite database file when using DB_TYPE=sqlite
